title: The Size DOES Matter (to me!)
content: If I'm still writing stuffs and posting 'em online, I wouldn't be able to get myself away from the _"i-want-small-fonts"_ idea. It keeps popping up every once in a while - especially when I saw the 'small fonts' at other people's site. Somehow, (some) small fonts look a lot cleaner than their larger-size counterparts. I certainly can use small fonts on my site. However, I'd have to write stuff in English, all of them. **Would that be okay with you?** ... :) %(me)Yes, I do like Georgia @ 8pt -but- I love Verdana @ 7pt!%
